title: ilex gale
intro: Ilex gale is a plant species, more commonly known as wintergreen, which is a type of evergreen shrub native to North America. The leaves of the ilex gale plant contain methyl salicylate, a compound that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of ilex gale include relief from sore muscles and joints, as well as its ability to alleviate digestive issues and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, ilex gale is often used in teas, infusions, and topicals, such as salves and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
